title: Vinsani 3 Compartment Meal Prep Containers – 10/20/30 Pack 32oz BPA-Free Reusable Plastic Food Storage Trays with Lids, Stackable Bento Lunch Boxes – Microwave, Freezer & Dishwasher Safe (10 Pack)
features: KEEPS FOOD FRESH WITH LEAK-RESISTANT LIDS: Vinsani Meal Prep Containers come with airtight, leak-resistant lids and sturdy corners to lock in freshness and prevent spills. Perfect for work, university, gym, or travel, so meals stay flavourful and secure.

IDEAL FOR PORTION CONTROL & MEAL PLANNING: Each container holds 32 oz and measures L24.3 x W18.8 x H4 cm, making it ideal for portion control and meal prep. Convenient for balanced diets and organising meals in advance.

SAFE FOR MICROWAVE, FREEZER & DISHWASHER: Crafted from premium, BPA-free plastic, these containers are designed for safe use in the microwave, freezer, and dishwasher. Raised lids offer extra capacity to keep food intact.
DURABLE & REUSABLE FOR EVERYDAY USE: This set includes reusable, sturdy containers, providing a convenient solution for meal prep and food storage. A reliable choice for keeping meals fresh.
STACKABLE FOR SPACE-SAVING STORAGE: These containers are stackable to maximise storage space and keep your kitchen organised. Available in 10, 20, or 30 packs to fit all meal prep needs.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: transporting meals to work or university, carrying packed lunches for the gym, bringing meals on travel or outdoor excursions
